sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48162" key="qeodh/lhtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θεο-δήλητος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n48162.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">by which the gods are injured</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μιαιφονίη</foreign> <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.l. in</abbr> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.157</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
